headlines.title: Investigators search California home connected to suspected shooter
headlines.description: FBI teams in tactical gear descended on the last known address connected to suspected shooter Cole Tomas Allen. A senior administration official tells NBC News the suspect’s alleged writings detail his anti-Trump views. NBC News’ Steve Patterson reports.

headlines.title: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots
headlines.description: Trump recalls being evacuated after WHCD gunshots

headlines.title: Trump renews calls for new White House ballroom after shooting
headlines.description: President Trump and his allies renewed calls for a new White House ballroom after Saturday night’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. NBC News’ Monica Alba reports.

headlines.title: President Trump raises hotel security concerns
headlines.description: After Cole Tomas Allen breached the White House Correspondents’ Dinner armed with multiple weapons, President Trump raised general security concerns about the size and layout of the hotel.

headlines.title: WHCD Suspect displayed anti-Trump sentiments in writings
headlines.description: WHCD Suspect displayed anti-Trump sentiments in writings

headlines.title: WHCD shooting was at same hotel where Reagan was shot
headlines.description: A former Secret Service agent recalls the moment Ronald Reagan was shot in 1981 at the Washington Hilton, the same hotel where shots were fired during the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

headlines.title: Washington residents react to shooting at WHCD
headlines.description: Washington residents react to shooting at WHCD

headlines.title: Video shows suspect from WHCD shooting detained by officials

headlines.title: Inside the WHCD after Trump's evacuation
headlines.description: NBC News' Kelly O'Donnell reports from inside the Washington Hilton, where President Trump was evacuated from the White House Correspondents Dinner.
